notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz grounds into an unassisted double play, first baseman Ty France. Carlos Cortes out at 2nd. Nick Kurtz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a double play, first baseman Ty France to shortstop Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Ty France. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil out at 1st.
